THE COURT GRANTED PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE CASE REMAINS IN BRAYTON GROUP 416, AND THE DATE OF 10/20/08 IS MAINTAINED. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCES ARE SET FOR 10/14/08, 10/16/08, AND 10/17/08 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 220. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT.
